channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: World Cup Freddy Visits More Iconic US Sites and Enters 'Burger Wars'
DOJ Expands Crackdown on Fraudulent Citizenship
item.description: The Trump administration plans to significantly increase efforts to revoke US citizenship of naturalized individuals accused of obtaining it fraudulently.

item.title: To Win a Utilities Contract in California, You Must Prove Your Sexuality
Top Senate Republican Criticizes Trump's Iran Deal, Says $300 Billion Makes Obama Deal Look Like 'a Pittance'
item.description: Senate Armed Services Chair Roger Wicker argues the Iran deal undermines US victories and that its $300 billion fund dwarfs the 2015 Obama agreement.
